message.unknown_echoes.wind_door.locked: The wind runes on the door glimmer faintly, but there is no answer.
message.unknown_echoes.beacon.need_mater: The beacon does not respond. It still lacks something that echoes.
message.unknown_echoes.beacon.need_key: The beacon does not respond. It waits for a key bound for the Echo Realm.
message.unknown_echoes.ability.wind_unlo: You hear the wind passing through the ruins.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.protected: The colossus is shrouded in heavy echoes.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.broken: The heavy echoes shatter! The colossus is exposed to the wind.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.guard_restor: The echoes gather once more, shrouding the colossus again.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.enraged: Cracks burst across the colossus — a forgotten fury rumbles deep within its stone shell.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.pillar_progr: The memory pillar answers your touch. (%s/%s)
message.unknown_echoes.colossus.simon_li: The memory pillars glow in sequence — remember it.
message.unknown_echoes.colossus.simon_re: Wake the pillars in the order the echo showed.
message.unknown_echoes.colossus.simon_wr: The order falters; the echo sinks, then whispers anew.
message.unknown_echoes.pillar.activated: The memory pillar begins to glow.
message.unknown_echoes.pillar.already_ac: This memory pillar is already whispering.
message.unknown_echoes.pillar.silent: The memory pillar stays silent. Nothing nearby needs awakening.
message.unknown_echoes.altar.locked: The altar stays silent. It only answers those who have faced the colossus.
message.unknown_echoes.altar.claimed: The echo is already with you.
message.unknown_echoes.mark.already: You have already heard this echo of the wind.
message.unknown_echoes.realm.entered: You step into the Echo Realm.
message.unknown_echoes.realm.returned: You return to the familiar world.
message.unknown_echoes.realm.disabled: The Echo Realm is currently disabled.
message.unknown_echoes.block.protected: A power echoes within this block. It cannot be broken.
message.unknown_echoes.crystal_feather_b: The crystal feather bird tilts its head away — the faint light along its feathers has yet to regather.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.echo_key: A key shaped from echo shards and a core. Use it to awaken a Resonance Beacon and open the way to the Echo Realm.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.wind_echo_mark: Use it to briefly hear the Wind Echo; the true echo comes only after the Forgotten Colossus falls.
message.unknown_echoes.projector.no_abil: The projector stays silent — you have not heard any echo yet.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.echo_projector: Use on the ground to cast an echo afterimage. It can hold down mechanisms for you.
message.unknown_echoes.sequence_rune.lit: This rune is already lit, quietly waiting for its kin.
message.unknown_echoes.sequence_rune.sil: The rune flickers once and dims. Nothing nearby answers it.
message.unknown_echoes.puzzle_core.solve: The core hums quietly. The seal here is long gone.
message.unknown_echoes.puzzle_core.reset: The runes go dark all at once. The order must be wrong.
message.unknown_echoes.puzzle_core.opene: After a low rumble, the seal quietly dissolves.
message.unknown_echoes.hidden_rune.plain: It looks like nothing more than ordinary stone bricks.
message.unknown_echoes.ancient_page.recy: The old page comes apart in your hand, leaving one echo fit to record again.
message.unknown_echoes.ancient_page.unre: This fragment echoes from too far away to enter the current journal.
page.unknown_echoes.0.title: Page ???
page.unknown_echoes.0.text: The writing has long faded. Only one line remains: ...go and listen.
page.unknown_echoes.1.title: Page 001 · First Echo Heard
page.unknown_echoes.1.text: We heard the voice from deep within the earth for the first time. It was not like wind, nor thunder. It was as if the world were remembering itself.
page.unknown_echoes.2.title: Page 002 · Not a Door, an Organ
page.unknown_echoes.2.text: The day the voice stopped, every bird flew toward the same horizon. We counted for three days and nights. Not one returned.
page.unknown_echoes.17.title: Page 017 · The Four-Pillar Court
page.unknown_echoes.17.text: The first beacon was not built by us. We merely dug it out of the mountainside.
page.unknown_echoes.23.title: Page 023 · Storm Weaver
page.unknown_echoes.23.text: The colossi are not weapons. They are listeners — standing in place, taking everything into the stone.
page.unknown_echoes.42.title: Page 042 · The Lake Does Not Lie
page.unknown_echoes.42.text: Do not trust your reflection. It knows things we were never meant to know.
page.unknown_echoes.56.title: Page 056 · Mirror-Dust Entrance
page.unknown_echoes.56.text: They wanted the earth to be silent. It refused, so they began tearing down everything that could speak.
page.unknown_echoes.89.title: Page 089 · Dream Honey and Supplies
page.unknown_echoes.89.text: When the last beacon lit, the sky did not open. Instead, the world began to answer.
page.unknown_echoes.104.title: Page 104 · Cliff Bridge
page.unknown_echoes.104.text: Final record: if anyone reads this page, do not search for us. Go and listen.
message.unknown_echoes.journal.recorded: Your journal quietly turns a page.
journal.unknown_echoes.pages.category.si: The Great Forgetting and Silent Swamp
message.unknown_echoes.ability.tide_unlo: You hear the tide whispering from the depths.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune.blurred: The runes waver in the water, too blurred to read.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_pillar.activ: A ripple spreads from the pillar. The water seems to remember you.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_pillar.alrea: The currents around this pillar already know your touch.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_altar.locked: The altar rests in silence. The lake has not yet heard your echo.
rune.unknown_echoes.tide.title: —— Sunken Rune ——
rune.unknown_echoes.tide.0: At high tide we sank the temple; at low tide the temple sank us.
rune.unknown_echoes.tide.1: Beneath the lake lies another surface. Do not trust the one you see first.
rune.unknown_echoes.tide.2: The Watcher keeps its eyes open in the deepest dark. It has counted every ripple.
rune.unknown_echoes.tide.3: To the one who wakes every pillar, the tide will return their name.
page.unknown_echoes.43.title: Page 043 · The Drowned Spire
page.unknown_echoes.43.text: The lake is far too calm. I dropped a stone, and the ripples spread the wrong way. We agreed never to face the lake's heart again.
page.unknown_echoes.44.title: Page 044 · Three Tidal Pillars
page.unknown_echoes.44.text: The temple was not drowned — it walked into the lakebed by itself. The pillars still wait for anyone willing to dive down and touch them.
page.unknown_echoes.45.title: Page 045 · The Watcher's Eye
page.unknown_echoes.45.text: Something at the bottom counts our shadows. It never surfaces. Remember: the true one falters only in its reflection.
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.clones: The black tide congeals into phantoms beside the runes — they stand guard!
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.veiled: Your strike passes through it, as if hitting a reflection.
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.broken: The reflections shatter! The Watcher's body is exposed to the current.
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.veil_rest: The water closes in again, and reflections gather around it once more.
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.runes_cor: A black tide creeps over the temple runes — purify them and tear its veil apart!
message.unknown_echoes.watcher.rune_prog: A rune runs clear again. The black tide still clings to %s runes.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune.purifie: The black tide recedes from the rune.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune.guarded: A black-tide phantom coils around the rune; the current pushes your hand away.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_altar.need_p: The altar remembers your victory, but the temple pillars do not all remember you yet.
message.unknown_echoes.mirror_sigil.acti: A steady white glow spreads across the sigil. The reflection remembers you.
message.unknown_echoes.mirror_sigil.alre: This sigil's reflection already carries your image.
message.unknown_echoes.mirror_sigil.fals: The mirror shatters into illusion dust — you touched only a reflection. The temple's memory blurs again.
message.unknown_echoes.truesight_altar.l: The altar reflects your face, but not your name.
message.unknown_echoes.truesight_altar.n: The altar remembers your victory, but the temple sigils do not all remember you yet.
message.unknown_echoes.guardian.illusion: Mirror dust fills the hall — identical figures rise around you.
message.unknown_echoes.guardian.veiled: Your strike lands on a mirrored surface, rippling away.
message.unknown_echoes.guardian.broken: The false images collapse inward! The guardian's true core is exposed.
message.unknown_echoes.guardian.veil_res: Mirror dust gathers again. True and false blur once more.
page.unknown_echoes.46.title: Page 046 · Black-Tide Threads
page.unknown_echoes.46.text: The one who entered the temple blindfolded was the one who survived. He said: do not choose with your eyes — listen. The true mirror rings lower.
page.unknown_echoes.47.title: Page 047 · Bubble Corridor
page.unknown_echoes.47.text: It does not guard the temple. It guards what lives inside the mirrors, so it never gets out. Before you anger it, count how many sigils in the hall are real.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.awakened: From deep below comes the sound of tumbling stone — the sleeper has awakened.
message.unknown_echoes.boss.area_sealed: Heavy echoes seal every stone in this place.
message.unknown_echoes.chest.sealed: The lid will not budge — the guardian is still watching it.
page.unknown_echoes.50.title: Page 050 · Underwater Runes
page.unknown_echoes.50.text: They said we turned our backs on the echoes. No — we merely keep, on the world's behalf, the part it no longer wishes to hear. The swamp accepted our vow, and our voices with it.
page.unknown_echoes.51.title: Page 051 · Names Kept by the Lake
page.unknown_echoes.51.text: Do not trust your ears here. The moss swallows footsteps; the water swallows cries. Watch how the moss leans, watch the ripples — the swamp never speaks, but it is always writing.
page.unknown_echoes.52.title: Page 052 · The Soundless Ring
page.unknown_echoes.52.text: The day the stone ring was finished, we made the Order's last rule: answers pass by no mouth, only carved on walls. Whoever can read the mural deserves what lies within the ring. Silence is not a curse.
message.unknown_echoes.observatory.locke: The wind marks on the core do not stir — it is waiting for a true wind.
The wind brushes the core, leaving a broken whisper: "...the archive sank into the lake... in the deepest water, something still keeps its eyes open, waiting to be lit..."
page.unknown_echoes.60.title: Page 060 · Cracked-Mirror Dais
page.unknown_echoes.60.text: We Chroniclers swore to record everything: every echo, every beacon, every name. We built the archive in the sky because the earth could no longer hold what we needed to write.
page.unknown_echoes.61.title: Page 061 · The Guardian's Weakness
page.unknown_echoes.61.text: The day the Great Forgetting came, the archive lost its weight. Pages scattered; the bridges broke. The wind tore the index apart — now it only repeats its final query.
page.unknown_echoes.62.title: Page 062 · Echo Lens
page.unknown_echoes.62.text: Do not mistake the currents for weather; they are the pointers of the index. Follow the wind to find archives that have not yet fallen. Walk against it to find the question that lost its answer.
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.tide_rune: Revisit: the tide knows you now — the blurred runes in the Sunken Temple should read clearly.
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.hidden_ro: Revisit: your eyes have changed — one wall in the Mirror Temple may no longer be a wall.
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.observato: Revisit: the wind knows you now — the Sky Observatory core awaits a true query.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.blueprint.wind_sp: Requires: Crystal Feather / Wind Rune Shard / Echo Metal
Margin note: "Let the wind deliver this thrust for you." (The blueprint is only a clue; once the wind obeys you, the recipe will surface)
tooltip.unknown_echoes.blueprint.tide_cr: Requires: Tide Core / Tide Rune Fragment / Echo String
Margin note: "Arrows are more honest underwater." (The blueprint is only a clue; study the tide deeply enough and the recipe will surface)
tooltip.unknown_echoes.blueprint.true_si: Requires: Mirror Shard / Illusion Dust / Echo Metal
Margin note: "The blade cannot tell true from false; the eyes holding it must." (The blueprint is only a clue; read the Mirror Lake research pages and the recipe will surface)
A rubbing of the wind's passage. Read quietly to deepen wind research.
A rubbing of the tide's patterns. Read quietly to deepen tide research.
A rubbing of the true lines beneath the mirror. Read quietly to deepen true sight research.
Reading also needs route materials; deeper research asks for rarer media.
You have already read these lines.
The rubbing stays silent toward you — it waits for an echo you have not yet heard.
The rubbing has not yet found your footsteps - first find the place it belongs to.
The lines hold nothing new for you; this research has reached the edge of the paper.
The rubbing still needs a resonant medium: %s x%s.
The rubbing's lines sink into your understanding (%s research level %s).
message.unknown_echoes.research.insight: An old understanding grows a little clearer in the echo.
message.unknown_echoes.recipe_unlocked.w: Suddenly you understand the wind's path across the blueprint. (New recipe: Windmark Spear)
message.unknown_echoes.recipe_unlocked.t: The tide's rhythm takes shape in your hands. (New recipe: Tide Crossbow)
The mirrored lines shed their disguise; the blade's outline becomes clear. (New recipe: True Sight Blade)
message.unknown_echoes.tide_crossbow.mar: In the bolt's wake, you sense the direction of a nearby rune.
Beneath the mirror, the true silhouette flashes for a moment.
screen.unknown_echoes.ability_panel.hint: Base: double jump; Wind research 1 unlocks third-jump glide and fall protection
Base: water breathing and Tide mechanisms; research 1 adds underwater speed, vision and energy recovery
Base: close hidden-glimmer sensing and True Sight mechanisms; research 1 adds illusion pulses and weak-point reading
An echo from deeper down. It has not reached you yet.
An echo from the very end. It has not reached you yet.
screen.unknown_echoes.ability_panel.sour: Abilities are granted by temple core altars; reinforcement: page research, rubbings, ruin revisits and guardians
advancement.unknown_echoes.root.title: Unknown Echoes
advancement.unknown_echoes.root.desc: Pick up a shard that still hums.
advancement.unknown_echoes.defeat_forgot: Face the Forgotten Colossus, and live to remember it.
advancement.unknown_echoes.ability_wind_: Hear the wind passing through the ruins at the core altar.
advancement.unknown_echoes.defeat_abyss_: Shatter every reflection of the Abyss Watcher on the lakebed.
advancement.unknown_echoes.ability_tide_: The tide has given your name back.
advancement.unknown_echoes.defeat_mirror: Find the real one among identical figures.
advancement.unknown_echoes.ability_true_: Illusions are no longer walls to you.
advancement.unknown_echoes.all_biomes.de: Set foot in all eight Echo Realm biomes: Echo Forest, Mirror Lake, Silent Swamp, Floating Isles, Echo Cliffs, Crystal Song Grove, Dreaming Meadow and Broken Bell Wastes.
advancement.unknown_echoes.all_pages.des: Read all 80 ancient pages of the first dimension.
message.unknown_echoes.pages.all_reward: Eighty echoes fold into one record, and blank tracing paper wakes in their light.
journal.unknown_echoes.book.no_revisit: No clues worth revisiting for now.
journal.unknown_echoes.book.research_not: Pages, rubbings, revisits and guardians all deepen research (● = researched).
message.unknown_echoes.storm_weaver.guar: The wind coils around it; your strike is pushed aside by the gale.
message.unknown_echoes.storm_weaver.brok: It crashes into a lull of the wind, feathers scattered — for a moment it lies open.
message.unknown_echoes.silent_priest.def: The silence pressing on the marsh disperses; far away, the insects sing again.
subtitles.unknown_echoes.broken_bell_kee: Broken Bell Keeper drags copper chains
subtitles.unknown_echoes.lost_recorder_c: Lost Recorder Chief turns archive pages
message.unknown_echoes.tide_buoy.lit: The buoy's flame sways gently in the water, its anchor chain drawn taut.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_buoy.cooling: The wick is still warm; its embers have yet to gather back into flame.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune_seat.bl: The water-script on the seat blurs, as if seen through a trembling lake surface.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune_seat.co: The rune's glow has sunk back into the stone for now.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune_seat.id: The rune casts a thread of cold light that slowly scatters through the water.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_rune_seat.fl: The rune flares; a shaft of cold light pierces the lantern's glow.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_lantern_keep: The lantern's halo turns your strike aside.
The current suddenly turns against you.
The lantern's shadow sinks to the lakebed. You note the tide-marks on the ruined lighthouse wall.
The tide lantern flickers one last time, and the lake falls still.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_lighthouse.l: The lantern's shadow does not answer yet.
message.unknown_echoes.mirror_dust_butle: The mirror sways; your strike lands in a reflection.
Mirror dust bursts in your face — it was only a reflection.
The cracked mask falls to pieces. You note the mirror-script on the hidden chamber's wall.
The mirror dust settles, and only your own reflection remains in the hall.
message.unknown_echoes.mirror_cloister.l: Only a film of mirror dust marks the wall. Nothing answers.
overview.unknown_echoes.title: Echo Overview
overview.unknown_echoes.subtitle.overvie: The star-disc of echoes turns slowly
overview.unknown_echoes.subtitle.ability: Traces the echoes left on you
overview.unknown_echoes.subtitle.journal: An archive copied by the sound of water
First awaken %s before these rubbings answer.
First step into %s before this line finds your trail.
overview.unknown_echoes.research.complet: This research has reached the edge of the page; only revisits and tuning remain.
overview.unknown_echoes.research.next.wi: Next: read a Wind page, or find a wind-pattern rubbing.
Next: read a Wind rubbing to extend gliding and wind-current sensing.
Next: Wind rubbings x2 + Wind Rune Shards x4 for wind-current and eroded-tower clues.
Next: Wind rubbings x3 + Storm Weaver Spindle to lower glide energy cost.
overview.unknown_echoes.research.next.ti: Next: read a Tide page to unlock underwater speed, vision, 30% underwater mining relief and water/rain energy recovery.
Next: read a Tide rubbing for +2 underwater reach and 50% underwater mining relief.
Next: Tide rubbings + Tide Upgrade Core and Mirror-Tide Alloy Plates to stabilize reflection doors longer.
Next: Tide rubbings + rare watcher materials and Oathbound Alloy to quicken energy recovery in water and rain.
overview.unknown_echoes.research.next.tr: Next: read a True Sight page to widen hidden sensing to 10 blocks and begin illusion pulses plus weak-point reading.
Next: read a True Sight rubbing to widen hidden/illusion sensing to 16 blocks, hurt exposed targets harder, and resist blindness.
Next: True Sight rubbings + True Sight Upgrade Core and Illusion Prisms to keep vision clear in darkness.
Next: True Sight rubbings + rare decoy materials and Oathbound Alloy to read illusion weak points better and deepen Echo Lens tuning.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.overview: The star-disc only gathers echoes you have heard; deeper clues still hide in ruins and pages.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.ability: Abilities are written by the world's reply; this page is only what you heard.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.journal: The archive grows with your steps; the blanks are still under water.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.research: Pages you have read stay here; rubbings join your research as you read them.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.artifact: Relics remember their keepers; lose the token, and the table still remembers.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.trade: The traveler hears but never understands; he answers with barter.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.index: The index only arranges footsteps already synchronized; claiming still belongs at the Grand Archive terminal.
overview.unknown_echoes.note.options: These switches change only what you see and hear, not the world itself.
overview.unknown_echoes.index.note: This page shows client-visible progress. It grants nothing and does not replace terminal validation; hidden answers stay hidden.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.start: Seek a resonance beacon - faint light gathers at forest edges.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.tide: A temple lies sunken beneath the mirror lake; the tide waits there.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.sight: Deep in the lake temple, some sigils are only reflections.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.lighthouse: A light sometimes sweeps the deep water of the mirror lake - something may lie below.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.cloister: If you find a wellhead on the lakeshore, see where its bottom leads.
overview.unknown_echoes.clue.research: Study your abilities deeper; puzzles and guardians both leave rubbings.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.overview: The star-disc has not turned yet. The first echo will wake it.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.ability: Only blank echo-lines wait here. When an ability answers you, they will light.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.journal: The archive is still under water. It will begin writing after your first step.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.research: The pages have not formed a line yet. Return after the first record is read.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.artifact: This page is still blank. When a vessel remembers its keeper, it will open by itself.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.trade: The wayfarer is still on the road. When the campfire is lit, the stall will unroll here.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.index: The index still sleeps deep in the archive. Finish the realm's closure, and it will unfold the gaps.
overview.unknown_echoes.dormant.options: These echoes have no shape to adjust yet.
overview.unknown_echoes.popup.close: Press ESC or click anywhere to close
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.tide_ligh: The tide-marks of the lighthouse ruin are worth another rubbing.
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.mirror_cl: The alcoves of the mirror dust cloister may still hide unread patterns.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.wind_spear.skill: ✦ Gale Lunge (Right-click, 8s): dash along your gaze as a blade of wind
tooltip.unknown_echoes.wind_spear.detail: The wind blade deals 120% damage to enemies in your path and flings them aside
tooltip.unknown_echoes.wind_spear.lore: The spearpoint always arrives before the sound of wind.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tide_crossbow.ski: ✦ Tideburst Bolt: the impact erupts, shoving nearby enemies away
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tide_crossbow.det: Needs no arrows - the lake condenses bolts for it (arrows and tipped arrows in your inventory are used first); no underwater drop-off; targets in water take 125% damage; hits briefly mark nearby tide runes (12s)
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tide_crossbow.lor: The lake remembers every bolt it has carried.
✦ Mirror-rend Combo: consecutive hits on one target stack mirror-marks; the third shatters
+25% damage to illusions, and the shatter burst doubles against them; striking a decoy reveals the true body (10s)
Some truths are only spoken by broken mirrors.
advancement.unknown_echoes.blueprint_fou: Find an equipment blueprint at the bottom of a ruin chest - someone thought about fighting the echoes before you did
Collect the Wind Spear, Tide Crossbow and True Sight Blade
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.disabled: The relic stays silent in this land.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.not_your: This relic's echo does not answer to you.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.not_elig: The record table searches its pages, but none bears your name.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.reissued: The record table traces its shadow anew.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.claimed: The echo of %s settles into your hands.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.need_spa: The record table pauses; clear one slot before it traces the credential.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.need_mat: The tuning table awaits the proper enhancement material.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.need_pro: The tuning table searches your trail; a few echoes still do not line up.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.need_dus: Re-tuning calls for a pinch of echo dust.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.tuning_l: It is not yet ready for a new word.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.tuning_u: The tuning table does not know that word.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.not_clai: You have not yet traced its shadow at a record table.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.no_energ: Your echo energy has not yet risen.
message.unknown_echoes.storm_compass.coo: The compass is still settling from its last search.
message.unknown_echoes.storm_compass.no_: The needle wanders—you have left no clues to follow yet.
message.unknown_echoes.storm_compass.poi: The needle settles toward the %2$s—an echo of %1$s lingers there, %3$s.
message.unknown_echoes.storm_compass.win: Windflow tugs the needle toward a platform echo to the %1$s, %2$s.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.storm_compass.hin: It still repeats its final search.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.clue_map.hint: A bearing folded into the creases.
message.unknown_echoes.observatory.clue_: The search-echo sweeps the isles and leaves a new bearing in your journal.
message.unknown_echoes.clue_map.read: Following the map's creases, you note the bearing of %s.
message.unknown_echoes.clue_map.too_far: The marks refuse to match this land—try reading it elsewhere.
message.unknown_echoes.lost_traveler.mut: "Once, beneath the lake, I saw another temple."
"The wind has carried the same sentence back three times."
"I hear it. I never understand it. It has always been so."
"Don't ask the way. The way keeps moving too."
message.unknown_echoes.trade.too_far: The traveler is no longer beside you.
message.unknown_echoes.trade.cant_afford: Your pockets can't gather what the traveler asks.
message.unknown_echoes.world_event.echo_: A fog seeps from the ground, threaded with faint echoes.
Something in the fog repeats your footsteps. You make note of this echo fog.
message.unknown_echoes.world_event.mirro: The lake's reflection hesitates—then begins to drift upward.
The reflected world moved first. You make note of the anomaly.
message.unknown_echoes.world_event.storm: Distant clouds press low; the wind carries an aftertaste of thunder.
The storm has not come, yet something has woken. You make note of the omen.
message.unknown_echoes.world_event.lost_: A thread of campfire smoke rises nearby.
A traveler by the fire gives you the slightest nod.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.storm_c: 10s flight; much less fall damage; 120s cooldown.
18s flight; brief safe landing after a glide; 80s cooldown.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.tide_la: +4 max health; active use restores health and food; 75s cooldown.
+6 max health; active use also cleanses one debuff; faster energy in water and rain.
+8 max health; auto-heals when low; stronger active heal with Regeneration.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.echo_le: Marks 1 target to reveal it; passively reveals nearby foes; slightly faster attacks; 60s cooldown.
Marks up to 2 targets; larger passive reveal range.
Active use interrupts nearby foes; bonus damage to broken bosses.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.hint.st: The Storm Compass is unlocked by personal exploration progress and can be reissued at record tables.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.at_tuni: The tuning table's inscriptions are lit.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.no_stat: This page is only a copy; new shadows are traced beside a station.
overview.unknown_echoes.trade.no_session: The traveler has not unrolled his mat for you. Find the campfire and speak with him.
overview.unknown_echoes.trade.footer: Click a row to trade; the traveler only honors what lies in the open.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.resonance_token.w: The memory pillars acknowledged you before the colossus fell. Bring it to the wind altar.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.resonance_token.t: The temple pillars answered you as one. Bring it to the tide core altar.
Every true sigil has been lit. Bring it to the true sight altar.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.resonance_token.g: This token has not found the altar where falling has meaning.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.resonance_token.v: This token murmurs only where the page is blank.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.resonance_token.b: A token answers only its owner; if lost, the mechanism will offer another.
message.unknown_echoes.token.granted: The mechanism offers you a %s — an altar awaits it.
message.unknown_echoes.token.reissued: The mechanism remembers you, and offers the token again.
message.unknown_echoes.altar.need_ritual: The altar stays silent — the memory pillars have never answered you.
message.unknown_echoes.altar.token_waiti: The altar awaits your token. Return to the mechanism; it will offer it again.
message.unknown_echoes.pillar.remedial: The wind-script on the pillar recognizes the one who felled the colossus, and offers a belated token.
message.unknown_echoes.glide.deny.cooldo: The wind has not yet gathered again.
message.unknown_echoes.glide.deny.energy: The echo lacks the strength to hold you aloft.
message.unknown_echoes.glide.deny.resear: The wind has not yet learned to hold your steps.
message.unknown_echoes.wind_platform.loc: The wind-script on the platform glimmers faintly, but does not answer.
message.unknown_echoes.wind_platform.act: An updraft rises from the platform.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_door.locked: The water-script on the door swirls slowly, but does not yield.
message.unknown_echoes.tide_door.opened: The water-script knows you; the door parts without a sound.
message.unknown_echoes.truesight_stele.s: The carvings on the stele tangle into meaningless scrawl.
message.unknown_echoes.truesight_chest.l: The chest's outline wavers and slips from your sight.
rune.unknown_echoes.true_sight.title: The inscription on the stele grows clear:
rune.unknown_echoes.true_sight.0: "We carved all we saw here. Later we learned to carve here all we wished unseen."
rune.unknown_echoes.true_sight.1: "Mirrors do not lie — the liar is the one who chooses which mirror to face."
rune.unknown_echoes.true_sight.2: "The Listeners said: what remains after you close your eyes is what is real."
rune.unknown_echoes.true_sight.3: "Some walls exist only because no one has ever doubted them."
journal.unknown_echoes.revisit.record_ro: A record room lies sunken beneath the Mirror Lake — an heir of the tide could finish reading its water-marks.
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.glide_en: The echo lacked strength to hold you aloft
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.glide_co: The wind had not gathered again
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.glide_re: The wind has not yet learned to hold your steps
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.platform: The platform's wind-script gave no answer
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.door_loc: The water-script door did not yield
overview.unknown_echoes.failure.chest_lo: The chest's shadow slipped from sight
overview.unknown_echoes.credentials.head: Credentials & Oaths
The moss on its shell is still thin, like a sentence left unfinished.
item.unknown_echoes.water_shadow_spawn_e: Mirror Lake Water Shadow Spawn Egg
message.unknown_echoes.dreaming_deer.not: The dreaming deer lowers its head; the flower scent still lingers in an earlier dream.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.explorer.name: Explorer Set
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.explorer.2: 2 pcs: Within the ruins, darkness steps aside for you.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.explorer.4: 4 pcs: Lighter steps, tougher gear, and echo creatures notice you later.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.explorer.area: Suited to early ruins and the Echo Realm threshold.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.listener.name: Listener Set
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.listener.2: 2 pcs: The glimmer of clues lingers longer for you.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.listener.4: 4 pcs: The wind carries you longer, and the land answers sooner.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.listener.area: Suited to midgame clues and wind gliding.
message.unknown_echoes.recipe_unlocked.l: The patterns suddenly make sense - the Listener's garb unfolds in your mind.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_sha: A common echo fragment, still trembling faintly in your palm.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_cor: Less like ore, more like a memory compressed into stone.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_cor: The sound of a tide that never fully recedes.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.true_sig: Look straight at it, and you first see your own back.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.watcher_: It still counts each ripple that passes by.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.silent_p: It cracks without a sound, even its bitterness muted.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.crystal_: A small draft of air held in branching crystal.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_met: A faint bell note hums inside the metal.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.wind_run: Its edge always stirs toward the same bearing.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_run: The wet rune-lines never truly dry.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_str: Pulled tight, it hums with an almost inaudible echo.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.illusion: Each grain lands with a false shadow before it falls.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.decoy_sh: The shard reflects no face, only one mistaken motion.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_dus: The smallest echo, useful for buying answers never spoken aloud.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.storm_co: The broken needle sometimes corrects itself.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.record_t: Thin paper, but heavy enough to hold very old sounds.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.wind_enh: A wind not yet released sleeps inside.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_fib: The fibers sway gently with nearby footsteps.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.glow_hid: Its light is soft, as if filtered through leaves.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.crystal_: Held near your ear, it plays an unfinished chord.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.resonant: More a fossilized sound than an ordinary crystal.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.sky_quar: A small piece of inverted sky rests inside each face.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.broken_b: Its missing teeth still twitch to a buried rhythm.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.rusted_t: Rust clings like a stopped second hand between the teeth.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.dream_ne: Its sweetness arrives slowly, like a dream just waking.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_amb: An answer not yet spoken is sealed inside the amber.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_sal: The grains feel like white foam left after the tide withdraws.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.wind_sac: A small breath of wind still rests inside the thin membrane.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_ban: Wrapped tight, it quiets the noise inside the wound.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.wind_chi: There is no wind in the bottle, only the chime it left behind.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_bre: A thin tide clings to the inner glass and never fully drains.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.revealin: When it falls, the false shadow coughs first.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.memory_e: Warm it in your hand and it remembers a breath that was not yours.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_clo: The weave remembers the footsteps that crossed it.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.blank_ec: Its blank space is not silent, only waiting for the right sound.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_ink: The ink rewrites its edges when no one is looking.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_mar: A mark is not a key; it proves you listened closely.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.traveler: The badge shows a road that stops halfway through.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.mirror_l: Its reflection always arrives a moment late.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_pea: A ripple is trapped inside and never spreads.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.mirror_s: Its edge looks like a clipped piece of lake surface.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.polished: Once finely ground, illusions become easier to expose.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.silence_: Hold it to your ear and even your breath steps back.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.moss_she: A quiet moss grows across the shell plate.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.inscript: The older the sheet, the more readily it takes new marks.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_ind: It never answers questions; it records where questions appeared.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.tide_upg: The tide-lines within the core still rise and fall slowly.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.true_sig: The lines beneath its mirror have not yet aligned.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.silence_: It is so quiet it can barely hear its own echo.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.crystal_: A scale inside the core has not yet found its pitch.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.broken_b: Every few seconds, the core falls one beat behind.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.attuned_: It learns each material's voice before letting them draw near.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_wea: The blank belongs to no route until the first material answers it.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_arm: Thin as it is, it presses noisy echoes into one quiet layer.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.material.echo_rea: Wind, tide and mirrorlight all cross its surface.
The realm-core still hums faintly, as if it remembers the way here.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.echo_oathb: Deals extra damage to enemies of the Echo Realm.
Its power comes from your abilities, gear and skill, not the weapon's own level.
It opens no doors for you; it only answers battle.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_pickaxe: Suited to gathering Echo Realm minerals.
Mines this realm's resource blocks more smoothly, with a faint resonance from the vein.
Suited to clearing mirror sand, eroded rubble and tide-worn ground.
Clears those loose blocks faster and may turn up a little echo dust.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_hatchet: Suited to working echo, whispering and tidewood.
Fells those logs faster; right-click a log to scrape a little resin.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_hoe.rol: Suited to harvesting dream flowers, muffle moss and crystal-song clusters.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_hoe.tri: Harvests those ecology blocks faster and may yield a byproduct.
For nonviolent gathering from friendly creatures.
Gathers more material from moss-back turtles and crystal feather birds.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_fishing: Suited to supply fishing in Mirror Lake and tide reefs.
Fishing in the Echo Realm may net extra common aquatic materials.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_brush.r: For clearing page clues and dig sites.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_brush.t: Brushing ruins or clue surfaces stirs dust and may yield tracing paper.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.tool.echo_igniter: For lighting camps, braziers and fuses.
Keeps flint-and-steel feel for ordinary lighting.
message.unknown_echoes.igniter.protected: The spark slides off the pattern without leaving a scorch.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.artifact.tide_lan: A credential answers only its keeper; record tables can reissue it.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.use.tide: The Tide Lantern washes your wounds in a soft tide.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.hint.ti: The Tide Lantern is unlocked by personal exploration progress and can be reissued at record tables.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.artifact.echo_len: A credential answers only its keeper; record tables can reissue it.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.use.echo: The Echo Lens catches a fracture in the target.
overview.unknown_echoes.artifact.hint.ec: The Echo Lens is unlocked by personal exploration progress and can be reissued at record tables.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.generic_: This relic is still settling from its last answer.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.echo_traveler: 2 pcs: reduced fall and minor environmental damage in the Echo Realm.
4 pcs: nearby material nodes give brief hint particles.
Suited to general Echo Realm exploration.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.wind_walker.2: 2 pcs: steadier airborne movement and softer landings.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.wind_walker.4: 4 pcs: wind glide costs and landing cooldown are slightly reduced.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.wind_walker.a: Suited to floating isles, wind platforms and vertical terrain.
2 pcs: improved underwater vision and mining penalty.
4 pcs: smoother swimming; Tide Lantern grants brief breath protection.
Suited to Mirror Lake, underwater ruins and tide mechanisms.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.true_sight_sh: 2 pcs: illusions and dim clues become easier to notice.
4 pcs: true-sight marks last longer; authorized hidden clues reach farther.
Suited to mirror-dust cloisters, mirror temples and illusion enemies.
2 pcs: visual suppression in the Silent Swamp is weakened.
4 pcs: slowness and weakness cling less in Silent Priest fields.
Suited to the Silent Swamp and Silent Priest encounters.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.echo_oath.2: 2 pcs: reduced ordinary environmental damage and minor control duration here.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.set.echo_oath.4: 4 pcs: all three artifacts regain energy slightly more steadily.
completion.unknown_echoes.reward.ready: When the hard gates and 150 score align, the Echo Index settles the personal reward.
completion.unknown_echoes.reward.claimed: The personal first-dimension reward has already been settled.
completion.unknown_echoes.index.locked: The Echo Index has not unfolded yet: score %s/%s.
completion.unknown_echoes.index.unlocked: The Echo Index is open: score %s. Deep prerequisites are being checked.
completion.unknown_echoes.index.expansio: Index Expansion I is aligned; touch the terminal again for backfill materials.
Index Expansion I has been archived.
Index Expansion II is aligned; the deep prerequisite list is about to unfold.
Index Expansion II has been archived.
completion.unknown_echoes.index.ready: No new gap remains in the deep prerequisite list.
message.unknown_echoes.completion.incomp: Several index pages still do not line up.
message.unknown_echoes.completion.claime: The index has already recorded this completion.
message.unknown_echoes.completion.need_s: The graduation is recorded; return with pack space to reclaim the core, materials, and clue.
message.unknown_echoes.completion.reward: The final page of the Echo Realm closes.
message.unknown_echoes.index.expansion1: The Echo Index turns up a small backfill bundle.
message.unknown_echoes.index.expansion2: A deep clue map develops on the final index page.
advancement.unknown_echoes.echo_realm_co: Settle the Echo Realm completion reward through the Echo Index system.
clue.unknown_echoes.echo_world_tree: A root-hum passes from tree to tree deep in the forest.
clue.unknown_echoes.eternal_echo_lightho: Far across the mirror lake, a beam sweeps from beneath the water.
clue.unknown_echoes.mirror_sea: A sea without waves holds the sky upside down.
clue.unknown_echoes.inverted_mountains: Above the isles, not every mountain-shadow touches ground.
clue.unknown_echoes.sky_rift: The wind hangs a rift behind the highest clouds.
clue.unknown_echoes.silent_great_boat: Deep in the swamp, a great boat gives no wooden sound.
clue.unknown_echoes.broken_bell_tower: The wind in the bell wastes bends around a tower that still keeps time.
message.unknown_echoes.crystal_songkeepe: The crystal song is not aligned; your strike breaks into noise.
The songkeeper raises its baton; resonance gathers overhead — complete the tuning to interrupt.
A column shatters; the great wave collapses into static.
The columns light in sequence — remember the echo.
Re-tune the columns in that order: right-click them, or strike them with the staff's wave.
The melody falters; the echo scatters and the songkeeper starts anew.
The melody aligns — the songkeeper reels. Strike now!
message.unknown_echoes.broken_bell_keepe: The pendulum has not fallen; time drags the strike aside.
The cracked bell rises and its pendulum counts down — strike it now.
The bell shudders; rusted plating sloughs away.
message.unknown_echoes.dream_bloom_keepe: The dream bloom has not woken; soft light closes the wound.
Every healing bud has withered; the soft light fades.
message.unknown_echoes.lost_recorder_chi: The archive pages are still turning; the strike is filed into blank space.
The scattered pages all return; the chief's review is interrupted.
The terminal turns its pages and orders the echoes still left unfiled.
advancement.unknown_echoes.enter_echo_re: Pass through the Resonance Beacon and let the first dimension unfold beneath you.
advancement.unknown_echoes.grand_archive: Awaken the Echo Archive Terminal and set the stray records in order.
advancement.unknown_echoes.echo_realm_gr: The index closes its final page, and the Echo Realm accepts your footsteps.
advancement.unknown_echoes.world_tree.de: Hear the whole realm humming through the root network.
advancement.unknown_echoes.mirror_sea.de: Stand before a sea without waves and record the coordinates of its reflection.
advancement.unknown_echoes.sky_rift.desc: Look up at the torn sky and read the archive behind the clouds.
advancement.unknown_echoes.silent_ark.de: Board the cabins without echoes and let the silence leave a record.
advancement.unknown_echoes.broken_bell_t: Remember the missing beat beneath the broken pendulum.
advancement.unknown_echoes.all_wonders.d: Record at least five first-dimension world wonders.
advancement.unknown_echoes.first_ability: Obtain any weapon etched with an echo current.
advancement.unknown_echoes.echo_traveler: Wear the full Echo Traveler set and steady your first steps.
advancement.unknown_echoes.regional_armo: Wear any full regional echo armor set.
advancement.unknown_echoes.oath_armor.de: Wear the full Echo Oath set and align every shard to one vow.
advancement.unknown_echoes.oathblade.des: Forge the Echo Oathblade and draw the first dimension's echoes into an edge.
advancement.unknown_echoes.first_researc: Gain the first level of understanding in any research line.
advancement.unknown_echoes.research_leve: Advance any research line to level 4.
advancement.unknown_echoes.all_base_rese: Complete the wind, tide and true sight base research lines.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.echo_broad: Art: hit the same target 3 times to trigger an echo fracture.
The fracture deals minor extra damage and briefly reveals the target.
The third answer is always louder than the first two.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.echo_battl: Art: heavy hits briefly weaken and interrupt ordinary enemies.
The armor break and interrupt work only on ordinary enemies.
When the axe falls, even old bells miss a beat.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.echo_longb: Art: a full-draw hit leaves your personal echo mark.
The mark applies only to your next attack.
After the string fades, the target still hears you.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.wind_spear: Art: right-click to gale-lunge and cut a wind blade along your gaze.
The lunge is real movement and will not pass through walls.
The spearpoint always arrives before the sound of wind.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.tide_cross: Art: tideburst bolts erupt on impact and ignore underwater drop-off.
With no arrows it forms its own bolt; targets in water take extra damage.
The lake remembers every bolt it has carried.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.true_sight: Art: consecutive hits stack mirror-marks; the third shatters.
Striking a decoy reveals the direction of the true body.
Some truths are only spoken by broken mirrors.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.silence_sc: Art: hits briefly suppress ordinary enemies.
Hits weaken ordinary enemies' attacks and movement.
After the scythe passes, even echoes lower their voice.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.crystal_so: Art: a sound pulse aids remote tuning and hampers nearby foes.
Works only on melody targets you have already found.
The crystal remembers the tune, but it will not answer for you.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.broken_bel: Art: repeated heavy hits within a short window trigger a broken-bell burst.
Repeated heavy hits in a short time trigger extra burst damage.
A broken bell no longer tells time, only debt.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.weapon.dream_bloo: Art: dream-mist arrows hinder ordinary enemies and can support allies.
The deeper the flower sleeps, the lighter the arrow flies.
tooltip.unknown_echoes.artifact.storm_co: Use to open a brief wind-path; sneak-use to trace clues. Credentials can be reissued.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.use.stor: The Storm Compass tears open a brief wind-path.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.echo_len: No stable fracture appears in the lens.
The lens catches lines that should not be there.
message.unknown_echoes.artifact.tide_lan: The lantern flares on its own for a heartbeat.
The dark tide is washed from you.
message.unknown_echoes.miniboss.reward_p: %s is held in the echo. Make room, and it will return.
